mapper.sql: id, title, content, summary, author_id, author_name, category_id, category_name, view_count, like_count, comment_count, is_top, is_essence, status, is_deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post (title, content, summary, author_id, author_name, category_id, category_name, status) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{summary}, #{authorId}, #{authorName}, #{categoryId}, #{categoryName}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM post WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, summary = #{summary}, category_id = #{categoryId}, category_name = #{categoryName}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE post SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET like_count = like_count - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND like_count > 0
UPDATE post SET like_count = #{likeCount} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET comment_count = comment_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET comment_count = comment_count - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND comment_count > 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM post WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = '0' AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = '0' AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT FROM post WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = '0' ORDER BY like_count DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
